name: Echoes: A semantically-aligned music deepfake detection dataset
summary: arXiv:2603.23667v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We introduce Echoes, a new dataset for music deepfake detection designed for training and benchmarking detectors under realistic and provid...
description: arXiv:2603.23667v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We introduce Echoes, a new dataset for music deepfake detection designed for training and benchmarking detectors under realistic and provider-diverse conditions. Echoes comprises 4,468 tracks (131 hours of audio) spanning multiple genres (pop, rock, electronic), and includes content generated by ten popular AI music generation systems. T...
author: Octavian Pascu, Dan Oneata, Horia Cucu, Nicolas M. Muller
